flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saginaw Valley State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.1k → $30.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saginaw Valley State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.1k → $12.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saginaw Valley State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Saginaw Valley State University rose 39% between 2006 and 2009 (6.5% → 9.0%).
